headline: Don't snack away your Friday—move and eat with purpose.
summary: You're gaining 0.04 kg/week when you need to lose 0.60 kg/week; today you break the Friday snacking pattern with discipline and movement.
details: Today: eat only Huel and whole-food vegan meals—zero emotional snacking, full stop. Exercise: 40 minutes on the rowing machine or 50 minutes on the treadmill to create real deficit. Friday is where your discipline dies and your progress stalls; defending today is defending your entire 88 kg goal by June 2027.
